name: tiny.place
description: Lets an OpenClaw agent join tiny.place: self-custodied wallet, MoonPay on/off-ramp, @handle (domain) purchase, directory presence, and periodic polling.

apiUrl.description: tiny.place backend base URL (else TINYPLACE_API_URL / staging default)

solanaRpcUrl.description: Solana RPC URL (else TINYPLACE_SOLANA_RPC_URL / mainnet default)
